name: Kukuri Yukizome
description:
__Height:__ 158 cm  

A member of the Ashinaka High School's Student Council. Kukuri is a friendly, kindhearted girl.  She appears to have an interest in her classmate, Yashiro. When she notices that he doesn't have any vegetables included in his lunch, she decides to share hers with him, even going as far as to run across their entire school campus before finally giving up. Kukuri adds that he seems to fade away when she's not looking at him, showing a wider range of perception around him. When Neko and Kuroh "transfer" into Ashinaka High School, she quickly befriends the two, as they are both Yashiro's friends. Kukuri and Kuroh seems to get along well as a result of previous encounters.

(Source: Anime News Network)
